title: SFR Space Access
description: How can a user access their SFR client area to view bills, manage accounts, and track consumption?
narrative: The user is seeking guidance on how to log in to the SFR client area (sfr.fr/espace-client) to access their account details, including viewing invoices, managing LICO lines, and monitoring usage. They may be encountering difficulties with login credentials, forgotten passwords, or unfamiliar account identifiers. Relevant documents must provide clear, step-by-step instructions for accessing the client area, including information about account identifiers (such as service account reference or email), password recovery, and the use of the SFR & Me or My Account applications. Documents related to RED by SFR, SFR Mail, or general customer service without direct access to the client area are not relevant unless they specifically assist with login or account access.

title: Oil Lamp Selection
description: What are the best oil lamps available in 2021, and what criteria should be considered when choosing one for indoor or outdoor use?
narrative: The user is seeking a comprehensive evaluation of top-performing oil lamps based on real-world performance, customer ratings, and practical features such as fuel type, durability, and design. They are interested in understanding which models offer optimal brightness, safety, and longevity, particularly for use in outdoor settings like gardens or camping, as well as in indoor environments like living rooms or bedrooms. Relevance is determined by documents that provide detailed comparisons, product specifications, user reviews, and guidance on selecting appropriate wicks, fuels, and glass types that match the lamp's design and intended use.

title: Car Rental in Madeira
description: What are the best options, prices, and considerations for renting a car in Madeira, including airport pickup, insurance, and vehicle types?
narrative: The user is planning a trip to Madeira and is seeking detailed information about renting a car to explore the island. They are interested in comparing prices across providers, understanding the process of picking up and returning a vehicle—especially at Madeira Airport—evaluating insurance options (including deductible coverage), and selecting an appropriate vehicle type based on road conditions and travel needs. The user also wants to know about additional services such as GPS, child seats, and the possibility of ferry crossings. Relevant documents should cover these aspects comprehensively, while documents focused solely on hiking, weather, or general travel tips without car rental specifics are not relevant.

title: New Potatoes Cooking
description: What are the best methods and tips for cooking new potatoes to preserve their delicate texture and flavor?
narrative: The user is seeking practical, detailed guidance on preparing new potatoes, which are known for their tender, waxy texture and subtle flavor. They are likely interested in recipes or techniques that highlight the unique qualities of new potatoes—such as sautéing, roasting, or boiling—while avoiding methods that might cause them to fall apart or lose their freshness. Relevance is determined by content that provides specific cooking instructions, ingredient pairings, preparation tips, and timing for new potatoes, especially those emphasizing gentle handling and short cooking times. Documents discussing general potato storage, growing, or unrelated recipes (e.g., potato patties or mashed potatoes) are not relevant, as they do not address the specific culinary preparation of new potatoes.

title: Return to Work Bonus Eligibility
description: What are the conditions and criteria for receiving a return-to-work bonus after one month of employment, particularly for individuals transitioning from unemployment benefits like RSA or SSA?
narrative: The user is seeking clarity on whether they are eligible for a return-to-work bonus after only one month of employment, especially after a period of unemployment supported by benefits such as RSA or SSA. The user may have recently secured a CDI (permanent contract) and is concerned about financial support to cover transition costs like moving expenses or housing. The relevance criteria include documents that confirm the existence of the bonus, eligibility conditions (such as contract type, duration, and benefit history), and the process for claiming it. Documents that discuss the discontinuation of the bonus after 2015, or those that refer to alternative aids like APRE (Personalized Back-to-Work Assistance), are relevant if they clarify the transition from the old bonus system to newer forms of support. Irrelevant documents include those discussing unrelated bonuses (e.g., Christmas bonus, employer bonuses), activity bonuses, or general employment schemes like 'Emploi franc' that do not pertain to the return-to-work bonus for individuals exiting unemployment.
